blockquote.b: Current Version of C-CDA ↔ FHIR US Core Mapping
blockquote.p: The current release of this IG adds relevant mapping content from C-CDA ↔ FHIR mapping project which was related to the original C-CDA on FHIR work.
The next release will aim to complete mappings to USCDI 3, address the known issues, and reintroduce the document profiles.
